about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Software developer focused on building reliable systems and solving real problems.
about.bio: I enjoy working on software that solves practical problems and grows into real products. My work often involves understanding how systems behave over time and improving them until they become simple, reliable, and maintainable.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about it.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.consent_text: Your request will be evaluated through the communication channels you have specified. To ensure uninterrupted service, please make sure your contact information is accurate.
contact.kvkk_text_before: I accept that my personal data will be processed solely for the purpose of responding to my request, in accordance with the
contact.kvkk_text_after: , and that I may be contacted through the contact information I have provided.
contact.kvkk_s1_body: This notice has been prepared to inform users about the protection of personal data collected through the Platform. The Platform is operated solely for the purpose of collecting user requests, without being affiliated with any legal entity.
contact.kvkk_s2_body: Your Name-Surname, Phone Number and/or Email address shared through the form are processed solely for the purpose of responding to your request. Your data will never be used for advertising, marketing, or sold to third parties.
contact.kvkk_s3_body: The information you share will be deleted from our system within a reasonable period after your request has been answered or the process has been completed. It is assumed that the data entry was made by the relevant person; responsibility for entering data belonging to someone else lies with the user.
contact.kvkk_s4_body: You can always request the deletion or correction of your data by creating a contact request through our website.
contact.kvkk_scroll_hint: Please scroll down to read the full text
